title: ajuga reptans
intro: Ajuga reptans, also known as Bugle or Common Bugle, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family that is native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and kill off bacteria and viruses. The health benefits of Ajuga reptans include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Ajuga reptans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
